signals.headline: South Korea's March 2026 annual inflation rose to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's March 2026 annual inflation rose to 2.2% | NO** | **MED confidence**

South Korea's annual inflation rate increased to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in January and February, missing market forecasts of 2.4% and remaining near the Bank of Korea's 2% target despite global energy volatility.[1] This is the most recent confirmed data (published around early April 2026), showing contained

signals.headline: US and Iran Weigh New Talks to Extend Ceasefire Before April 21 Expiration; Trump Advances Naval Blockade | NO | MED con
signals.raw:
US and Iran Weigh New Talks to Extend Ceasefire Before April 21 Expiration; Trump Advances Naval Blockade | NO | MED confidence**

No confirmed ceasefire agreement, resolution, or announcement has occurred as of April 14, 2026—only reports of potential further negotiations between the US and Iran to secure a "bigger ceasefire deal" before the current two-week truce expires around April 21.[2] U.S.
